transcript.text:
[Tzuyang experiences being a woman diver]
You're fit for this occupation
[New employee Tzuyang]
[The superiors]
[Let's go!]
[You get caught, you go in my tummy]
[Her superior]
[A full bag of seafood]
It's alive! It's moving!
[Fresh seafood]
[Seafood noodle mukbang]
Today, I will be following around the women divers to see what it's like
Not too sure how she'll do
We'll find out once she gets in the water
[Let's go aboard]
[Changes into diver suit]

She looks great! She should officially become a diver
[You look great!]
What can we catch today?
Abalone, shells, conch,
Let's take everything
Today's goal? Just 1
[See if you can]
I will do my best today to catch as many seafood as I can
It's not that easy
[Tzu-squid]
[No blood flow]
What are you doing? Wear the goggles too!
How are you going to breathe?
[I got you]
[Prepping for the dive]
You look like a model!

Woman diver model
This is the navigation
[Moving from Yokji island to Dumi island]
[Scanning for the perfect spot]
[Dive!]
[Diving veteran]
[About 7 meters deep]
[I'm scared]
Let's go to the shallow spot [3 meters deep]
[Perfect for Tzuyang]
Wait a minute, I'm scared
Yeah, keep doing that
[Underwater experience]
[30 second experience is over] It's a jellyfish! A huge jellyfish!
[Heavy breathing] It's scary
[I'm scared]

[Revenge!]
[Retreating after catching nothing]
What happens if I get stung by a jellyfish?
It hurts
An octopus is swimming back and forth here
Okay then I'll catch it
[After I eat some ice cream]
[This time for sure]
I'll catch one this time
[Caught a conch]
Just come out
Are you having a hard time?
There's nothing
That's all you got?
[2 hours of dive & catch]
This pretty lady going in the water

Have you done this before?
No, this is my very first time
[Meanwhile]
[5 hours of dive & catch]
Come out now
[Finishing up]
[Baby bird Tzuyang waiting]
[And that's not everything]
Did you catch a lot?
I caught 5 little sea snails
For 2 hours
Good job
[Telling them how she only caught 5 in 2 hours]
I caught these
Can I buy them off of you?
I'm going to cook some spicy seafood noodles

Let's eat together You better share
I will be taking this home to cook spicy seafood noodles!
It's so hot. Let's stand up for a bit Where's the fan?
I'm sweating so much
It's so hot
I followed the women divers for these I caught some too
Conch
Here we have 6 octopuses, 6 shrimps, 6 Japanese squids,
The squids are still alive!?
And we have a huge oyster
4 abalones and horned conch,
2 octopuses, uni,
Today's weather is very hot
Should I eat 6 packs of noodles only?
Let's do 7
Let's make the broth first

1..
7... wait let's just put 6
[In goes the abalone]
The rest of these will get cooked really fast
So I will put them in when I cook the noodles I'll take out the abalone in a bit too
Should I just cook the abalone with the noodles as well?
This should be okay, right?
Yeah, let's just cook it when we cook the noodles
It cooks very fast anyway
1, 2, 3
4, 5
Let's just eat 6 packs only because it's so hot
Nah, let's put 1 more
I won't allow any leftovers
Let's take out the noodles now
Time for the seafood

6 Japanese squids
Red pepper, chicken stock
1 spoonful (?)
Abalone..
Octopus, horned conch
The shells I caught, and the uni
Bon appetit!
Hair needs to be tied [It's so hot]
I wish this was a cold noodle
Cold Spicy Seafood Noodles..
Too bad it isn't
This is the Japanese squid
These are really tasty
Just like a regular squid
Let's get some uni
The uni roe are not fully cooked

So it's delicious
What is this?
What will this be? I'm curious
I'm scared! The bee is humongous
Help me
[Frozen]
This is.. a little too much...
No, please! What if I get stung?
It was like this big
That wasn't a bee?
It was a scarab?
This is cooked sea squirt
Delicious!
Very big abalone
Should I eat the big one first?
I can't eat this in 1 bite

This is the natural oyster
They caught this today
That's amazing Let's get some kimchi
Japanese squid again
It's so good It's filled with roe
Will it show if I cut it open?
It's completely filled! Take a look
It's very similar to the webfoot octopus
It's so good
I'll try a small-sized octopus
It's so tender
Let's eat the horned conch
The outside is very hard
Take out the meat
Take out the hard part, and twist!
The intestines didn't need to come out, but it did

I'm not going to eat its intestines It's too bitter for me
Delicious
I cooked the noodles when it wasn't fully seasoned
So the noodles didn't soak up all the flavors yet
Small abalone This is considered pretty small
Natural oyster
Meow
Come here
I'll give you some
[I'm lazy, you come over here]
Is there anything I can give him?
[Tosses cooked octopus]
I realized why the noodles didn't taste good It's bland!
Help me
This mukbang is ruined
The soup is so bland, that's why the noodles don't taste good

It's like the noodles were cooked in plain water
What do I do now?
[Let's leave the noodle for now]
Who wants the noodles?
Any takers?
[Runs away]
[Tsk tsk]
[Hehe]
That's so tender
Let's get the octopus leg
Cut it up as a whole
Yummy
Yum
Today's mukbang is ruined..
Anyways, it's getting late now so I'll end it here
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
